title: pavonia tiliifolia
intro: Pavonia tiliifolia, also known as Rose Mallow or Pavonia, is a flowering plant species native to the Americas, belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin irritations, and inflammation. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin conditions, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pavonia tiliifolia include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
